question: Explain why ΔS has a large positive value.
full_answer: The reaction forms several gaseous molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of movement increases greatly, so disorder increases.

rounds.prompt: The reaction forms several _____ molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of movement increases greatly, so disorder increases.
The reaction forms several gaseous molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of _____ increases greatly, so disorder increases.
The reaction forms several gaseous molecules from liquid and solid reactants. The number of particles with freedom of movement increases greatly, so _____ increases.

question: Explain why ΔS has a large positive value in a reaction that forms several gases.
full_answer: The number of gaseous molecules increases. Gases have greater freedom of movement, so the disorder of the system increases significantly.

rounds.prompt: The number of gaseous molecules _____. Gases have greater freedom of movement, so the disorder of the system increases significantly.
